productDisplayName: Fila Women Elixir Low White Shoes
description: Perfect for those who love to run or play Sports that involve running, the fila Elixir Low sneaker is packed with features like a fabulous ventilation and shock absorption that makes it a great buy. Upper Meshed upper for ultimate ventilation, offering sweat-free comfort Synthetic leather overlays and toe box for enhanced shoe structure Branding on lateral midfoot for added style Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Fabric inner lining with a padded tongue and collar for all-day sweat-free comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Cushioned fabric footbed for all-day, sweat-free comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole TPR outsole with flex grooves in fore foot for easy movement Waffle pattern lugs in the forefoot and a decoupled heel for enhanced grip and traction Scooped mid-heel for cushioning to the back foot Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
